hypothesis: If a single-agent pipeline that converts PDFs to structured markdown with marker-pdf and integrates GPT-4o image captioning is used for end-to-end chemical information extraction, then it will achieve higher per-column F1 scores and better output-format compliance than baseline LLMs, a general-purpose agent, and domain-specific multi-agent systems on the ChemX nanozyme and chelate datasets because preserving document structure and minimizing orchestration complexity improves precision and recall.
